revision.content:
Makevention Board Meeting for September 10th, 2025

I. Called at 1805

    A. Attendees: Calob, Kevin, Joe, Kyle, Nathan, Jimmy, Sistoria, Apple

II. $2100 sponserships/donations

    A. final payment for Switchyard Park this Friday

III. Table layout for Switchyard Park

    A. ~16 exhibitors

    B. Bloomington Parkeour wants in

    C. Bloomington Ham Club has registered

        1. question is inside or outside

    D. Cook responded as a gold sponser

        2. which makes the sign topper discussion moot

IV. Sandwich board printing

V. Scheduling

    A. one meeting per week in lead-up to Makevention

VI. Volunteers

VII. Schedule

    A. 0730 to 0800 start setting up flags and moving things

    B. Sistoria wrangled outside volunteers

    C. Frees up Bloominglabs members to staff Bloominglabs booth

    D. No response from food trucks thus far

    E. Water and snacks for volunteers

        1. possibility of doanted pizzas and doughnuts, ala Calob

    F. check Makevention gear

    G. 

VIII. Quomments

    A. Reddit access

        1. post week before, and day before

    B. Website

        1. all exhibitors updated

    C. All known free event calendars Nathan has submitted Makevention to

        1. Eventbrite?

        2. Meetup.com costs money

        3. Fever?

        4. Partiful?

    D. Facebook advertising

        1. ~$200 to explore

    E. Nathan cold called an exhibitor, didn't answer but signed up

XI. Next year scedule

    A. Current date is heavily contested

    B. October 3rd and October 10th suggested

    C. IU Football schedule?

    D. what about booking two weekends and canceling one?

        1. nonrefundable 40% deposit

    E. aim for first weekend in October

X. Adjourned at 1845
